THE THIN AND MOSTLY TRANSPARENT CONDENSATION CLOUD EXTENDED FROM THE CLOUD BASE TO THE HORIZON, BUT VIEW OF THE WATERS SURFACE WAS OBSCURED. LOCATION ESTIMATED BASED ON RADAR DATA.
